title: EXPRMNTL 4 revisited: Belgian avant-garde legend to be screened at Cinéstesia
content:
Cinéstesia, a new initiative exploring the intersection of film and visual arts at the Espoo Ciné International Film Festival, 21–30 August 2026 in Espoo & Helsinki.

The post EXPRMNTL 4 revisited: Belgian avant-garde legend to be screened at Cinéstesia appeared first on Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux.
